Questions?

Phone(718) 689-2469

Frequently Asked
Questions

What should my child wear to class?

Leotard or fitted athletic wear, hair in neat bun/ponytail, bare feet or gymnastics shoes, NO jewelry, NO loose clothing.

How do I know which program is right for my child?

We offer free assessments! Book a trial class where our coaches can evaluate your child's skills and recommend the best program.

What is your makeup policy?

We understand schedules change. We offer one makeup class per month for absences with advance notice.

Do you offer private lessons?

Yes! Private lessons are available for one-on-one coaching. Contact us for availability.

Can parents watch classes?

Absolutely! We have a comfortable viewing area. We also offer parent observation weeks throughout the year.

Ready to Start Your Journey?

Book a free trial class and discover the magic of rhythmic gymnastics.

Book Free Trial

Where Grace Meets Strength

Premier rhythmic gymnastics academy in McKinney, Texas. Building confident athletes through expert coaching and a supportive community.
